name: Pixel Room displays pet sprite and daily missions
description: The Pixel Room page shows the user's companion pet with an animated sprite, pet mood status, and a list of today's missions with progress indicators.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the My Room section in the sidebar to expand it, then click Visit My Room
Verify the Pixel Room page displays an animated pet sprite image, a pet status message indicating its mood, and a Today's Missions section with at least one mission item
